features.title: 聊天区滑窗支持
features.user_visible_behavior: 当前聊天区文本长度超过窗口限制后只固定显示最老的历史消息，改为始终默认显示最新的信息，并支持通过鼠标上下滚动显示
verification: 聊天区和API msg显示始终默认显示最新的信息，并支持通过鼠标上下滚动显示
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
evidence: 1: Added auto-scroll useEffect in ChatPanel.jsx (line 93-98) depending on [messages, isLoading, tw.displayedCount, showApiRequest]; chat-history has overflow-y: auto CSS for mouse scrolling support

2: Verified no custom scrollbar components - unit test ChatPanelScroll.test.js:test('should not have custom scrollbar UI components') and e2e test app.e2e.chat.test.js:test('should not have custom scrollbar UI components in chat panel')
3: All tests pass: 31 unit test suites (165 tests), 2 integration suites (18 tests), 33 e2e tests
4: eslint 0 warnings, 0 errors on entire project

features.title: 增加聊天历史清空功能
features.user_visible_behavior: 在聊天标题栏中增加支持清空聊天历史的ui组件
verification: 聊天标题栏中存在清空聊天历史的ui组件
点击ui组件后可以清空当前聊天历史
ui设计符合项目ui设计规范
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
